title: Smooth Animated Doors
description: Fixes UV inconsistencies allowing a smooth animation. Companion RP for the Animated Doors Mod & DataPack
body:
# ✨ Smooth Animated Doors This pack fixes UV inconsistencies in doors, trapdoors & fence gates, allowing a smooth animation for opening & closing!
This is a direct dependency for the [Animated Doors Mod/DataPack](https://modrinth.com/project/animated-doors). The resource pack does **not** include the animation on its own! ![Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MiraculixxT/AnimatedDoors/refs/heads/main/.media/animated_doors.webp)
View the [**Galery**](https://modrinth.com/mod/animated-doors/gallery) for more previews ## ⚙️ Which version? All 2.0 versions are mod companions for the [Animated Doors Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/animated-doors), improving the visual effect. This pack should also be a reference for all model creators to apply similar UV fixes to ensure smooth animations with custom models. All 1.0 versions are DataPack companions for the [Animated Doors DataPack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/animated-doors/versions?l=datapack), not only improving visuals but be required to see the effect at all! You can not use any 2.0 version for the DataPack!
